hero.title: Highland Garni
hero.subtitle: A premium triangle-house retreat suspended between basalt cliffs and open Armenian sky.

gallery.title: Spaces carved for stillness
gallery.subtitle: Architectural triangle cabins, panoramic glass, and a quiet that only a mountain can give you.

categories.interiorsDesc: Warm timber, tall glass, fireplaces lit at dusk.
categories.exteriorsDesc: Triangle cabins set against basalt cliffs.
categories.viewsDesc: Infinity edge, mountain horizons, open sky.

about.title: Where the gorge meets the sky
about.p1: Highland Garni is a small collection of triangle houses set on a ridge above the Garni gorge, where basalt columns fall to the river and the mountains hold the horizon.
about.p2: Each cabin is built around a single idea: a quiet room, a tall window, and a view that doesn't ask anything of you.
about.p3: Come to slow down. Walk to the temple, drive to the monastery, or stay in and let the weather move across the valley.

reserve.title: Book your stay
reserve.subtitle: Pending and approved dates are blocked automatically.
reserve.success: Reservation received. We'll be in touch shortly.
reserve.errorRange: Selected dates overlap an existing reservation.
